bio: Dr. Priya Sharma is a licensed clinical psychologist with over 10 years of experience in helping college students navigate academic stress, anxiety, and adjustment challenges. She uses evidence-based approaches including CBT and mindfulness techniques.

Dr. Rahul Mehta specializes in treating depression, mood disorders, and emotional well-being in young adults. With a compassionate approach, he creates a safe space for students to explore their feelings and develop coping strategies.

Ms. Ananya Gupta is a certified counselor focusing on interpersonal relationships, social anxiety, and communication skills. She helps students build healthy relationships and improve their social confidence through practical exercises.

Dr. Kavita Reddy helps students overcome procrastination, perfectionism, and academic burnout. Her approach combines cognitive behavioral techniques with motivational interviewing to help students reach their full potential.
